title: 2 IT Services Stocks to Buy From a Challenging Industry
text: Pandemic-led sluggish enterprise IT spending has clouded the outlook for the Zacks Computers - IT Services Industry. However, the solid uptake of digital remote-working solutions makes things rosy for companies like Amdocs (DOX) and Dell Technologies (DELL).

title: Wall Street Analysts See a 38% Upside in Dell Technologies (DELL): Can the Stock Really Move This High?
text: The average of price targets set by Wall Street analysts indicates a potential upside of 38.4% in Dell Technologies (DELL). While the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric is questionable, the positive trend in earnings estimate revisions might translate into an upside in the stock.

title: Newest Precision Powerhouse Features AMD Ryzen™ Threadripper™ PRO
text: Precision 7865 Tower unites performance and computing power in AMD-powered Precision workstation ROUND ROCK, Texas , June 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- It's no coincidence that in our 25th anniversary year of Dell Precision, we've unveiled some of the most powerful workstations ever – with no signs of slowing. It began earlier this year when we introduced the world's most powerful 14in mobile workstation,i followed by last month's unveiling of the new Precision 7000 Series mobile workstations.

title: How Much Upside is Left in Dell Technologies (DELL)? Wall Street Analysts Think 30%
